Comment:
Had a lovely experience at Coffee Island! We tried the butter croissant, pistachio cappuccino, and maple pancake with whipped cream — and honestly, everything was absolutely delicious.

The croissant was perfectly flaky and buttery, just how it should be. The pistachio cappuccino had a rich, nutty flavor without being overpowering — such a unique and well-balanced drink. And the maple pancake with whipped cream - Soft, indulgent, and beautifully authentic.

Definitely a great spot if you’re looking for quality coffee and desserts done right. Will be coming back!
Absolutely worth visiting the place while u shopping at phoenix....a girl named Sayali was so nice to talk as she helped me with a perfect choice of an ice cream and very nice service.....

One of the best flatbreads I’ve ever tried! The taste was absolutely amazing and the thickness was just perfect. Everything about it was spot on. The serving style was very innovative, neat, and impressive. It was truly a lovely experience. Highly recommended! ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
